docUpload.title: Document upload
docUpload.subtitle: Send lab results, photos and notes straight to your patient record.
docUpload.foundDesc: We found your record by the email <hl>{email}</hl>. Click continue to send your files.
docUpload.notFound: Email not found. Complete your registration to continue.
docUpload.securityNote: Your information is sent securely and is only visible to the clinic team.
docUpload.dropHint: Photos, PDFs · up to 15 MB per file
docUpload.notesPlaceholder: Describe your symptoms, recent history, questions or anything else you'd like to share with your clinic...
docUpload.filesFooter: Your files go straight to your clinic record, secure and encrypted.
docUpload.doneHint: The clinic team can now see your documents and notes in your record.

capture.publicIntro: Fill in your details and answer the questionnaire. It only takes a few minutes.
capture.consent: I authorize the clinic to process my personal and health data for contact and care purposes.
capture.nameRequired: Please enter your first and last name.
capture.privacyNote: Your data is protected and used only for your care.
capture.publicDoneDesc: Thank you. The clinic team will review them and get in touch with you soon.
capture.scoreIntro: Here's your result based on your answers.
capture.inviteTitle: Want a detailed report or to book an evaluation?
capture.inviteDesc: Leave your email or phone and our team will reach out.
capture.inviteThanks: Thank you! Our team will be in touch soon.
capture.inviteError: Please enter a valid email or phone.
capture.disclosure: Wellness self-check, not a medical diagnosis. This questionnaire (MSQ) is an educational wellness tool from Integrative Functional Wellness Center (IFWC / Moreira & Angeli LLC). It does not diagnose any condition and is not medical care or a substitute for advice from your doctor. If you have a medical concern, contact a licensed provider.
capture.consentRequiredEn: I understand this is an educational wellness tool and not medical care. I agree that my answers are collected by IFWC and used as described in the
capture.contactOptIn: I'd like IFWC to email/call me with my results or to schedule a wellness assessment. I consent to being contacted at the email/phone I provide.

result.heading: Your snapshot
result.whatThisMeansBody: This is a snapshot of how your body is signaling today, not a diagnosis. These signals often change with sleep, stress, nutrition, and recovery, so a result today isn't a fixed picture of your health. It's simply a starting point for a conversation.
result.ctaBody: An integrative assessment looks at these signals in more depth, together with your history and goals. If you'd like to talk it through, we're here, no pressure.
result.noteA: A couple of things you marked, like chest or breathing symptoms, are worth mentioning to a healthcare provider, even if they feel minor. This isn't a cause for alarm; it's just the kind of thing that's good to have a professional take a look at.
result.noteB: Because your body is signaling strongly today, it's a good idea to loop in a doctor so you have someone to look at the full picture with you. A snapshot like this can't tell us the cause, and it isn't a diagnosis, so a professional is the best next step.
result.noteC: Thank you for being honest about how you're feeling. You don't have to carry this on your own. Support is available 24/7: call or text 988 (Veterans: press 1). And someone from our team is right here if you'd like to talk.
result.footerDisclaimer: This tool is for educational and wellness purposes and does not replace medical care.
result.footer988: If you're going through a hard time, support is available 24/7: call or text 988 (Veterans: press 1).
result.footerAge: For ages 18+, or with a parent or guardian.
